collection.summary: Discovery Agent validated @thewholetruthfoods, Collection Agent gathered 70 items, and Insight Agent ranked 0 Indian competitors.
warnings: Free local collector is running through Playwright instead of a paid provider.
Saved Instagram session detected. Deep post and reel collection is enabled.
Large runs are slower now because each post or reel is collected directly from Instagram pages on your machine.

recommendations.targetObservation: Insights are based on 70 collected post/reel items across 1 Instagram accounts.
priorities: Start with the highest-frequency hook patterns among the top-ranked competitors.
Use the repeated posting windows and interval patterns as the first scheduling benchmark.
Borrow thumbnail patterns from the top-performing reels before changing copy structure.
buildNext: Add longitudinal saved runs so the dashboard can compare hook and posting changes over time.
Add CSV export for the normalized media inventory per competitor.
Wire Instagram login fallback only for accounts where provider collection is incomplete.
